honesty_note: CPU/fixture wiring campaign. Phases 0, 1, and 5 run the committed VSS4-01 benchmark and VSS4-02 fixture matrix (R0/R1) on CPU. Phases 2-4 and 6 and matrix rows R2-R6 are blocked because the required frontier artifacts (trainable checkpoints, capsule/surface benchmark families, energy/surface training CLIs) are not present in this repository state. No model, quality, or ship claim is made.
